legal_framework.surveillance_law: SORM (System of Operative Investigative Measures) / Yarovaya Law 2016
legal_framework.data_retention: 3 years (communications content), 6 months (metadata) — operators must install FSB hardware

real_world_references: SORM-3: ISPs required to install FSB hardware giving direct wiretapping access without judicial oversight
Yarovaya Law: requires telecom providers to store all communications content for 6 months and metadata for 3 years
RuNet sovereign internet: law enabling Russia to disconnect from global internet and route all traffic through state nodes
Surveillance of protesters: facial recognition used to identify and arrest anti-war protesters within hours of protests
